author: builder
summary: Implemented FK audit in migrate-to-pg.ts to detect orphaned records before SQLite-to-Postgres data migration. Audit checks all 14 FK relationships defined across the schema.

files_changed.description: Added runFKAudit function, FK_RELATIONS table, formatViolationReport helper, and --force flag to bypass audit

audit_behavior.detection_method: SQL NOT IN subquery for each FK relationship
audit_behavior.reporting: Grouped by table with violation details (column, refTable, missing ref ID)
audit_behavior.force_flag: --force bypasses FK audit and proceeds with migration
audit_behavior.exit_on_failure: Non-zero exit code with detailed violation report

acceptance_criteria_met.criterion: FK audit detects orphaned records across all 14 relationships
acceptance_criteria_met.evidence: runFKAudit function iterates FK_RELATIONS, runs NOT IN queries for each

acceptance_criteria_met.criterion: Orphaned records stop migration with clear report
acceptance_criteria_met.evidence: formatViolationReport groups by table, shows column→refTable and missing ID

acceptance_criteria_met.criterion: --force flag bypasses audit for manual override

results: FK audit is integrated into the migration pipeline. All 14 FK relationships checked before any data is copied. Migration halts with detailed report if violations exist, or proceeds after clear confirmation. --force flag available for manual override.
